block.header: ame no umi ni kumo no nami tati tukwi no pune posi no payasi ni kogikakuru miyu
tune pa sane omopanu monowo ko no tukwi no sugwikakuremaku wosiki yopi kamo
masurawo no yuzuwe puriokosi karitaka no nwopye sape kiywoku teru tukuywo kamo
yama no pa ni isaywopu tukwi wo idemu ka to matitutu woru ni ywo so kutatikyeru
asu no yopi teramu tukuywo pa katayori ni koyopi ni yorite ywo nagaku aranamu
tamadareno wosu no ma toposi pitori wite miru sirusi naki yupudukuywo kamo
kasugayama osite teraseru ko no tukwi pa imo ga nipa ni mo sayakekarikyeri
unapara no miti topomi ka mo tukuyomi no pikari sukunaki ywo pa kutatitutu
momosikwi no opomiyapito no makaridete aswobu koyopi no tukwi no sayakesa
nubatamano ywo wataru tukwi wo todomemu ni nisi no yamapye ni seki mo aranu kamo
ko no tukwi no koko ni kitareba ima to ka mo imo ga idetati matitutu aru ramu
maswokagami teru beki tukwi wo sirwotapeno kumo ka kakuseru ama tu kwiri kamo
pisakatano amateru tukwi pa kamuyo ni ka idekapyeru ramu tosi pa penitutu
nubatamano ywo wataru tukwi wo omosirwomi wa ga woru swode ni tuyu so okinikyeru
minasoko no tama sape sayani mitu beku mo teru tukuywo kamo ywo no pukeyukeba
simogumori su to ni ka aramu pisakatano ywo wataru tukwi no miyenaku omopeba
yama no pa ni isaywopu tukwi wo itu to ka mo wa pa mati woramu ywo pa pukenitutu
imo ga atari wa pa swode puramu konoma ywori idekuru tukwi ni kumo na tanabiki
yuki kakuru tomonowo piroki opotomo ni kuni sakayemu to tukwi pa teru rasi
anasigapa kapanami tatinu makimoku no yutukwigatake ni kumowi tateru rasi
asipikino yamagapa no se no naru nabe ni yutukwigatake ni kumo tatiwataru
opoumi ni sima mo aranaku ni unapara no tayutapu nami ni tateru siragumo
wagimokwo ga akamo no suswo no pidutinamu kyepu no kwosame ni ware sape nurena
toporu beku ame pa na puri so wagimokwo ga katami no koromo ware sita ni kyeri
naru kamwi no oto nomwi kikisi makimuku no pipara no yama wo kyepu mituru kamo
mimoro no so no yamanami ni kwora ga te wo makimukuyama pa tugi no yorosi mo
wa ga koromo irodori somemu umasake mimurwo no yama pa momiti sinikyeri
mimorotuku miwayama mireba komorikuno patuse no pipara omopoyuru kamo
inisipye no koto pa siranu wo ware mite mo pisasiku narinu amenokaguyama
wa ga sekwo wo koti koseyama to pito pa ipedo kimi mo kimasazu yama no na ni a rasi
kwidi ni koso imoyama ari to ipe tamakusige putagamiyama mo imo koso arikyere
katawoka no ko no mukatuwo ni sipi makaba kotosi no natu no kage ni swopemu ka
makimuku no anasinokapa yu yuku midu no tayuru koto naku mata kapyerimimu
nubatamano yworu sarikureba makimukunokapa to takasi mo arasi ka mo twoki
opokimino mikasanoyama no obi ni seru posotanigapa no oto no sayakesa
imasiku pa mime ya to omopisi miyosinwo no opokapayodo wo kyepu mituru kamo
uma namete miyosinwogapa wo mimaku pori utikwoyekite so taki ni aswobituru
oto ni kiki me ni pa imada minu yosinwogapa mututa no yodo wo kyepu mituru kamo
kapadu naku kiywoki kapara wo kyepu mite pa itu ka kwoyekite mitutu sinwopamu
patusegapa sirayupubana ni otitagitu se wo sayakemito mi ni kosi ware wo
patusegapa nagaruru miwo no se wo payami wide kwosu nami no oto no kiywokyeku
sapinokuma pinokumagapa no se wo payami kimi ga te toraba kotoyosemu kamo
yutane maku arakwi no woda wo motomemu to ayupi idenurenu ko no kapa no se ni
inisipye mo kaku kikitutu ya sinwopikyemu ko no purukapa no kiywoki se no to wo
panekadura ima suru imo wo urawakami iza izakapa no oto no sayakesa
ko no wogapa kwiri no musubyeru tagitiyuku pasiriwi no upe ni kotoage senedomo
wa ga pimo wo imo ga te motite yupuyakapa mata kapyerimimu yoroduyo madeni
imo ga pimo yupuyakaputi wo inisipye no pito sape miki to ko wo tare ka siru
nubatamano wa ga kurwokami ni purinadumu ame no tuyusimo toreba kenitutu
sima mwi su to iswo ni misi pana kaze pukite nami pa yosu tomo torazupa yamazi
inisipye ni arikyemu pito mo wa ga goto ka miwa no pipara ni kazasi worikyemu
yuku kapa no sugwinisi pito no taworaneba uraburetateri miwa no pipara pa
miyosinwo no awonegamine no kokemusiro tare ka orikyemu tate nuki nasi ni
imoragari wa ga yuku miti no sinwosusuki ware si kaywopaba nabikye sinwopara
yama no ma ni wataru akisa no yukite wimu so no kapa no se ni nami tatu na yume
sapogapa no kiywoki kapara ni naku tidori kapadu to putatu wasurekanetu mo
sapogapa ni sabasiru tidori ywogutatite na ga kowe kikeba inegatenaku ni
kiywoki se ni tidori tuma ywobi yama no ma ni kasumi tatu ramu kamunabwi no satwo
tositukwi mo imada penaku ni asukagapa seze yu watasisi ipapasi mo nasi
otitagitu pasiriwi no midu no kiywoku areba okite pa ware pa yukikatenu kamo
asibi nasu sakayesi kimi ga porisi wi no isiwi no midu pa nomedo akanu kamo
koto toreba nageki sakidatu kedasiku mo koto no sitabwi ni tuma ya komoreru
kamusaburu ipane kogosiki miyosinwo no mikumariyama wo mireba kanasi mo
mwinapito no kwopuru miyosinwo kyepu mireba ube mo kwopwikyeri yamakapa kiywomi
imenowada koto ni si arikyeri ututu ni mo mitekyeru monowo omopi si omopeba
sumyegamwi no kamwi no miyapito tokorotura iya tokosikuni ware kapyerimimu
yosinwogapa ipa to kasipa to tokipa nasu ware pa kaywopamu yoroduyo madeni
udikapa pa yodose naka rasi aziropito pune ywobapu kowe wotikoti kikoyu
udikapa ni opuru sugamo wo kapa payami torazu kinikyeri tutwo ni semasi wo
udipito no tatope no azirwo ware naraba ima pa yoramasi kotumi kozu tomo
udikapa wo pune watase wo to ywobapedomo kikoyezaru rasi kadi no to mo sezu
tipayapito udikapa nami wo kiywomi ka mo tabi yuku pito no tatigateni suru
sinagadori winanwo wo kureba arimayama yupugwiri tatinu yadori pa nakute
sinagadori wina no uramwi wo kogikureba yupugwiri tatinu yadori pa nakute
mukwogapa no miwo wo payami ka akagwoma no agaku tagiti ni nurenikyeru kamo
inoti wo si sakiku yokyemu to ipabasiru tarumi no midu wo musubite nomitu
saywo pukete poriye kogu naru maturabune kadi no to takasi miwo payami ka mo
kuyasiku mo mitinuru sipo ka suminoye no kwisi no uramwi yu yukamasi monowo
imo ga tame kapi wo piripu to tinunoumi ni nurenisi swode pa posedo kawakazu
medurasiki pito wo wagipyeni suminoye no kwisi no panipu wo mimu yosi moga mo
itwoma araba piripi ni yukamu suminoye no kwisi ni yoru to pu kwopwiwasuregapi
uma namete kyepu wa ga mituru suminoye no kwisi no panipu wo yoroduyo ni mimu
suminoye ni yuku to pu miti ni kinopu misi kwopwiwasuregapi koto ni si arikyeri
suminoye no kwisi ni ipye moga oki ni pye ni yosuru siranami mitutu sinwopamu
opotomonomitu no pamapye wo utisarasi yosekuru nami no yuku pye sirazu mo
kadi no to so ponokani su naru amawotomye okitumo kari ni punade su rasi mo
yupu sareba kadi no to su nari amawotomye okitumo kari ni punade su rasi mo
suminoye no nagwo no pamapye ni uma tatete tama piripisiku tune wasurayezu
ame pa puru karipo pa tukuru itu no ma ni agwo no sipopwi ni tama pa piripamu
nagwonoumi no asake no nagori kyepu mo ka mo iswo no uramwi ni midarete aru ramu
suminoye no toposatwowonwo no mapari moti sureru koromo no sakarisugwiyuku
tokitukaze pukamaku sirazu agwo no umi no asake no sipo ni tamamo karitena
suminoye no oki tu siranami kaze pukeba kiyosuru pama wo mireba kiywosi mo
suminoye no kwisi no matugane utisarasi yosekuru nami no oto no sayakesa
nanipagata sipopwi ni tatite miwataseba apadinosima ni tadu wataru miyu
ipyesakari tabi ni si areba akikaze no samuki yupubye ni kari nakiwataru
matwokata no minatwo no sudori nami tate ya tuma ywobitatete pye ni tikaduku mo
ayutigata sipo pwinikye rasi titanoura ni asa kogu pune mo oki ni yoru miyu
sipo pureba tomoni kata ni ide naku tadu no kowe topozakaru iswomwi su rasi mo
yupunagi ni asari suru tadu sipo miteba okinami takami ono ga duma ywobu
inisipye ni arikyemu pito no motometutu kinu ni surikyemu manwo no paripara
asari su to iswo ni wa ga misi nanoriso wo idure no sima no ama ka karikyemu
kyepu mo ka mo oki tu tamamo pa siranami no yapyeworu ga pe ni midarete aru ramu
apuminoumi mitwo pa ya swo ari iduku ni ka kimi ga pune pate kusa musubikyemu
sasanami no namikurayama ni kumowireba ame so puru t ipu kapyeriko wa ga se
opomipune patete samorapu takasima no miwo no katunwo no nagisa si omopoyu
iduku ni ka punanori sikyemu takasima no katori no ura yu kogidekuru pune
pwidapito no makwi nagasu to pu nipunokapa koto pa kaywopedo pune so kaywopanu
ararepuri kasima no saki wo nami takami sugwite ya yukamu kwoposiki monowo
asigara no pakwone tobikwoye yuku tadu no tomosiki mireba yamato si omopoyu
natuswobiku unakami no oki tu su ni tori pa sudakedo kimi pa oto mo sezu
wakasa n aru mikata no umi no pama kiywomi iyukikapyerapi miredo akanu kamo
inaminwo pa yukisugwinu rasi amadutapu pikasa no ura ni nami tateri miyu
sikamaye pa kogisugwinu rasi amadutapu pikasa no ura ni nami tateri miyu
ipye ni site ware pa kwopwimu na inaminwo no asadi ga upe ni terisi tukuywo wo
ariswo kwosu nami wo kasikwomi apadisima mizu ka sugwinamu kokoda tikaki wo
asagasumi yamazu tanabiku tatutayama punade semu pi ni ware kwopwimu kamo
amawobune po ka mo pareru to miru madeni tomo no uramwi ni nami tateri miyu
masakikute mata kapyerimimu masurawo no te ni makimoteru tomo no uramwi wo
torizimono umi ni ukiwite oki tu nami sawaku wo kikeba amata kanasi mo
asanagi ni makadi kogidete mitutu kosi mitu no matubara namigwosi ni miyu
asari suru amawotomyera ga swode topori nurenisi koromo posedo kawakazu
abiki suru ama to ka mi ramu akunoura no kiywoki ariswo wo mi ni kosi ware wo
yama kwoyete topotu no pama no ipatutuzi wa ga kuru madeni pupumite arimate
opoumi ni arasi na puki so sinagadori wina no minatwo ni pune paturu made
pune patete kasi puritatete ipori semu nagwoye no pamapye sugwikatenu kamo
imo ga kadwo ideiri no kapa no se wo payami wa ga ma tumaduku ipye mopu rasi mo
sirwotape ni nipopu matuti no yamagapa ni wa ga uma nadumu ipye kwopu rasi mo
senoyama ni tadani mukapyeru imonoyama koto yuruse ya mo utipasi watasu
kwinokuni no sapikanoura ni ide mireba ama no tomosibwi nami no ma yu miyu
asagoromo kyereba natukasi kwinokuni no imosenoyama ni asa maku wagimo
tutwo moga to kopaba torasemu to kapi piripu ware wo nurasu na oki tu siranami
te ni toru ga kara ni wasuru to ama no ipisi kwopwiwasuregapi koto ni si arikyeri
asari su to iswo ni sumu tadu ake yukeba pamakaze samumi onoduma ywobu mo
mokaribune oki kogiku rasi imogasima katami no ura ni tadu kakeru miyu
wa ga pune pa oki yu na sakari mukapebune katamatigateri ura yu kogi apamu
opoumi no minasoko toyomi tatu nami no yoramu to omopyeru iswo no sayakesa
ariswo yu mo masite omope ya tamanoura no panarekwosima no ime ni si miyuru
iswo no pe ni tumakwi woritaki na ga tameto wa ga kadukikosi oki tu siratama
pama kiywomi iswo ni a ga woreba mimu pito pa ama to ka mi ramu turi mo senaku ni
oki tu kadi yakuyaku sibuwo mimaku pori wa ga suru satwo no kakuraku wosi mo
oki tu nami pye tu mo makimoti yoseku tomo kimi ni masareru tama yoseme ya mo
oki tu nami pyenami sikusiku yoseku tomo kimi ni masareru tama yoseme ya mo
apasima ni kogiwataramu to omopedomo akasinotwo nami imada sawakyeri
imo ni kwopwi wa ga kwoyeyukeba senoyama no imo ni kwopwizute aru ga tomosisa
pito naraba papa ga managwo so asamoyosi kwinokapa no pye no imo to senoyama
wagimokwo ni wa ga kwopwi yukeba tomosiku mo narabi woru kamo imo to senoyama
imo ga atari ima so wa ga yuku me nomwi dani ware ni miyekoso kototopazu tomo
ate sugwite itokanoyama no sakurabana tirazu aranamu kapyerikuru made
nagusayama koto ni si arikyeri wa ga kwopwi no tipye no pitopye mo nagusamenaku ni
ada pye yuku wosute no yama no makwi no pa mo pisasiku mineba koke musinikyeri
tamatusima yoku mite imase awoniyosi nara n aru pito no matitwopaba ikani
sipo mitaba ikani semu to ka watatumi no kamwi ga two wataru amawotomyedomo
tamatusima mitesi yokyeku mo ware pa nasi miyakwo ni yukite kwopwimaku omopeba
kurwousi no umi kurenawi nipopu momosikwino opomiyapito si asari su rasi mo
wakanoura ni siranami tatite oki tu kaze samuki yupubye pa yamato si omopoyu
imo ga tame tama wo piripu to kwinokuni no yuranomisaki ni ko no pi kurasitu
wa ga pune no kadi pa na piki so yamato ywori kwopwikosi kokoro imada akanaku ni
tamatusima miredomo akazu ikani site tutumimoti yukamu minu pito no tame
wata no soko oki kogu pune wo pye ni yosemu kaze mo pukanu ka nami tatazusite
opobayama kasumi tanabiki saywo pukete wa ga pune patemu tomari sirazu mo
saywo pukete ywonaka no kata ni obobosiku ywobisi punabito patenikyemu kamo
miwagasaki ariswo mo miyezu nami tatinu iduku yu yukamu yokwidi pa nasi ni
iswo ni tati okipye wo mireba mekaribune ama kogidu rasi kamo kakeru miyu
kazapayano mipo no uramwi wo kogu pune no punabito sawaku nami tatu rasi mo
wa ga pune pa akasi no mitwo ni kogi patemu okipye na sakari saywo pukenikyeri
tipayaburu kanenomisaki wo sugwinu tomo ware pa wasurezi sika no sumyekamwi
amagwirapi pikata puku rasi midukukwino wokanominatwo ni nami tatiwataru
opoumi no nami pa kasikwosi sikaredomo kamwi wo inorite punade seba ikani
wotomyera ga oru pata no pe wo makusi moti kakage takusima nami no ma yu miyu
sipo payami iswomwi ni woreba asari suru ama to ya mi ramu tabi yuku ware wo
nami takasi ikani kaditori midutori no ukine ya su beki napo ya kogu beki
ime nomwi ni tugite miyetutu sinwosima no iswo kwosu nami no sikusiku omopoyu
sidukeku mo kwisi ni pa nami pa yosekyeru ka ko no ipye toposi kikitutu woreba
takasima no adwo siranami pa sawaku tomo ware pa ipye omopu ipori kanasimi
opoumi no iswomoto yusuri tatu nami no yoramu to omopyeru pama no kiywokyeku
tamakusige mimorotwoyama wo yukisikaba omosirwoku site inisipye omopoyu
nubatamano kurwokamiyama wo asa kwoyete yamasitatuyu ni nurenikyeru kamo
asipikino yama yukikurasi yadwo karaba imo tatimatite yadwo kasamu kamo
miwataseba tikaki satwomwi wo tamotopori ima so wa ga kuru pire purisi nwo ni
wotomyera ga panari no kami wo yupu no yama kumo na tanabiki ipye no atari mimu
sika no ama no turibune no tuna apenaku ni kokoro ni omopite idete kinikyeri
sika no ama no sipo yaku keburi kaze wo itami tati pa noborazu yama ni tanabiku
oponamuti sukunamikamwi no tukurasisi imosenoyama wo miraku si yosi mo
wagimokwo to mitutu sinwopamu oki tu mo no pana sakitaraba ware ni tugekoso
kimi ga tame ukinu no ike no pisi toru to wa ga simesi swode nurenikyeru kamo
imo ga tame suga no mwi tori ni yukisi ware pa yamadi ni matwopi ko no pi kurasitu
sapogapa ni naku naru tidori nani si ka mo kapara wo sinwopi iya kapa noboru
pito kosoba oboni mo ipame wa ga kokoda sinwopu kapara wo sime yupu na yume
sasanami no sigatu no ama pa ware nasi ni kaduki pa na se so nami tatazu tomo
opobune ni kadi si mo aranamu kimi nasi ni kaduki seme ya mo nami tatazu tomo
tukwikusa ni koromo so simuru kimi ga tame simi no koromo wo suramu to omopite
parukasumi wi no pye yu tadani miti pa aredo kimi ni apamu to tamotoporiku mo
miti no pye no kusapukayuri no pana wemi ni wemisi ga kara ni tuma to ipu besi ya
moda arazi to koto no nagusa ni ipu koto wo kikisireraku pa asiku pa arikyeri
sapekiyama unopana moteru kanasiki ga te wo si toriteba pana pa tiru tomo
tokizikuni madarano koromo ki posiki ka sima no paripara toki ni aranedomo
yamamori no satwopye ni kaywopu yamamiti so sigeku narikyeru wasurekye rasi mo
asipikwino yamatubaki saku yatuwo kwoye sisi matu kimi ga ipapiduma kamo
akatoki to ywogarasu nakedo ko no woka no konure no upe pa imada sidukesi
nisi no iti ni tada pitori idete me narabezu kapitesi kinu no akizikori kamo
kotosi yuku nipisimamori ga asagoromo kata no maywopi pa tare ka torimimu
opobune wo arumi ni kogide yapune take wa ga misi kwora ga mami pa sirusi mo
momosikwi no opomiyapito no pumisi atwodokoro oki tu nami kiyosezariseba usezaramasi wo
kwora ga te wo makimukuyama pa tune ni aredo sugwinisi pito ni yuki makame ya mo
makimuku no yamapye toyomite yuku midu no minawa no gotosi yo no pito ware pa
komorikuno patusenoyama ni teru tukwi pa mitikake sikyeri pito no tunenaki
topoku arite kumowi ni miyuru imo ga ipye ni payaku itaramu ayumye kurwokwoma
tati no siri saya ni irinwo ni kuzu piku wagimo maswode moti kisetemu to ka mo natukusa karu mo
suminoye no paduma no kimi ga umanorikoromo sapidurapu ayamye wo suwete nupyeru koromo zo
suminoye no idemi no pama no siba na kari sone wotomyera ga akamo no suswo no nurete yuku mimu
suminoye no woda wo karasu kwo yatukwo ka mo naki yatukwo aredo imo ga mitameto watakusida karu
ike no pye no wotukwi no moto no sinwo na kari sone sore wo dani kimi ga katami ni mitutu sinwopamu
amenaru pimyesugapara no kusa na kari sone minanowata kagurwoki kami ni akuta si tuku mo
natukage no tumaya no sita ni kinu tatu wagimo ura makete wa ga tame tataba yaya oponi tate
adusayumi pikitubye ni aru nanoriso no pana tumu madeni apazarame ya mo nanoriso no pana
utipisasu miyadi wo yuku ni wa ga mo pa yarenu tamanowono omopimidarete ipye ni aramasi wo
kimi ga tame tadikara tukare oritaru kinu zo paru saraba ikanaru iro ni suriteba yokyemu
pasitateno kurapasiyama ni tateru sirakumo mimaku pori wa ga suru nabeni tateru sirakumo
pasitateno kurapasigapa no isi no pasi pa mo wozakari ni wa ga wataritesi isi no pasi pa mo
pasitateno kurapasigapa no kapa no sidusuge wa ga karite kasa ni mo amanu kapa no sidusuge
parupi sura ta ni tati tukaru kimi pa kanasi mo wakakusano tuma naki kimi si ta ni tati tukaru
yamasiro no kuse no yasiro no kusa na tawori so wa ga toki to tatisakayu tomo kusa na tawori so
awomidura yosami no para ni pito mo apanu kamo ipabasiru apumiagata no monogatari semu
minatwo no asi no urapa wo tare ka taworisi wa ga sekwo ga puru te wo mimu to ware so taworisi
kaki kwoyuru inu ywobikwosite togari suru kimi awoyama no sigeki yamapye ni uma yasume kimi
wata no soko oki tu tamamo no nanoriso no pana imo to ware to koko ni si ari to nanoriso no pana
ko no woka ni kusa karu warapa sika na kari sone aritutu mo kimi ga kimasaba mimakusa ni semu
yepayasi ni yadoru sisi ya mo motomuru ni yoki sirwotapeno swode makiagete sisi matu wa ga se
ararepuri topotu apumi no adokapayanagwi karitu tomo mata mo opu to pu adokapayanagwi
asadukupi mukapi no yama ni tukwi tateri miyu topoduma wo motitaru pito si mitutu sinwopamu
kasuga n aru mikasanoyama ni tukwi no pune idu miyabwiwo no nomu sakaduki ni kage ni miyetutu
ima tukuru madarano koromo omokage ni ware ni omopoyu imada kinedomo
kurenawi ni koromo simemaku posikyedomo kite nipopaba ka pito no siru beki
ka ni kaku ni pito pa ipu tomo oritugamu wa ga patamono no sirwoasagoromo
adimura no towoyoru umi ni pune ukete siratama toru to pito ni sirayu na
wotikoti no iswo no naka n aru siratama wo pito ni sirayezu mimu yosi moga mo
watatumi no te ni makimoteru tama yuweni iswo no uramwi ni kaduki suru kamo
watatumi no moteru siratama mimaku pori titabi so norisi kaduki suru ama
kaduki suru ama pa noru tomo watatumi no kokoro si ezupa miyu to ipanaku ni
amakumo no tanabiku yama no komoritaru wa ga sitagokoro konopa siru ramu
miredo akanu pitokuniyama no konopa wo so ono ga kokoro ni natukasimi omopu
ko no yama no momiti no sita no pana wo wa ga patupatuni mite napo kwopwinikyeri
ko no kapa yu pune pa yuku beku ari to ipedo watarize gotoni mamoru pito arite
opoumi wo mamoru minatwo ni koto si araba idupye yu kimi ga wa wo wisinwogamu
kaze pukeba umi koso arure asu to ipaba pisasikaru besi kimi ga manima ni
kumogakuru kwosima no kamwi no kasikwokyeba me koso pyedatere kokoro pyedate ya
turupami no kinu pa pito mwina kotonasi to ipisi toki ywori ki posiku omopoyu
oporokani ware si omopaba sita ni kite narenisi kinu wo torite kime ya mo
kurenawi no kwozome no koromo sita ni kite upe ni tori kiba kotonasamu kamo
turupami no tokiarapikinu no ayasiku mo kotoni ki posiki ko no yupupye kamo
tatibana no sima ni si woreba kapa topomi sarasazu nupisi a ga sitagoromo
kaputimye no tezome no ito wo kurikapyesi kataito ni aredo tayemu to omope ya
wata no soko siduku siratama kaze pukite umi pa aru tomo torazupa yamazi
soko kiywomi sidukyeru tama wo mimaku pori titabi so nori si kaduki suru ama
opoki umi no minasoko terasi siduku tama ipapite toramu kaze na puki sone
minasoko ni siduku siratama tare yuweni kokorotukusite wa ga omopanaku ni
yononaka pa tune kaku nomwi ka musubitesi siratama no wo no tayuraku omopeba
isenoumi no ama no simatu ga apabitama torite noti mo ka kwopwi no sigekyemu
wata no soko oki tu siratama yosi wo nami tune kaku nomwi ya kwopwiwatarinamu
asi no ne no nemokoro omopite musubitesi tama no wo to ipaba pito tokame ya mo
siratama wo te ni pa makazuni pakwo nomwi ni okyerisi pito so tama nagekasuru
terusadu ga te ni makipurusu tama moga mo so no wo pa kapyete wa ga tama ni semu
akikaze pa tugite na puki so wata no soko oki n aru tama wo te ni maku madeni
piza ni pusu tama no wogoto no kotonakupa ito kokodaku ni ware kwopwime ya mo
mitinoku no adatara mayumi tura pakete pikaba ka pito no wa wo kotonasamu
minabuti no posokapayama ni tatu mayumi yuduka maku made pito ni sirayezi
ipatatami kasikwoki yama to siritutu mo ware pa kwopuru ka nami naranaku ni
ipa ga ne no kogosiki yama ni irisomete yama natukasimi idekatenu kamo
sapoyama wo oboni misikado ima mireba yama natukasi mo kaze puku na yume
okuyama no ipa ni koke musi kasikwokyedo omopu kokoro wo ikani ka mo semu
omopiamari ita mo subye nami tamatasuki unebwinoyama ni ware pa sime yupu
puyugomori paru no oponwo wo yaku pito pa yakitarane ka mo wa ga kokoro yaku
kadurakwi no takama no kayanwo paya sirite sime sasamasi wo ima so kuyasiki
wa ga yadwo ni opuru tutipari kokoro yu mo omopanu pito no kinu ni surayu na
tukwikusa ni koromo irodori suramedomo uturopu iro to ipu ga kurusisa
murasaki no ito wo so wa ga yoru asipikino yamatatibana wo nukamu to omopite
matamatuku woti no sugapara ware karazu pito no karamaku wosiki sugapara
yama takami yupupi kakurinu asadipara noti mimu tameni sime yupamasi wo
kotitakupa kamokamo semu wo ipasiro no nwopye no sitakusa ware si kariteba
kotitakupa kamokamo semu wo kurenawino utusigokoro ya imo ni apazaramu
matorisumu unate no mori no suga no ne wo kinu ni kakituke kisemu kwo moga mo
tune naranu pitokuniyama no akidunwo no kakitupata wo si ime ni miru kamo
wominapyesi sakisapapye no makuzupara itu ka mo kurite wa ga kinu ni kimu
kimi ni niru kusa to misi ywori wa ga simesi nwoyama no asadi pito na kari sone
misimaye no tamaye no komo wo simesi ywori ono ga to so omopu imada karanedo
kaku site ya napo ya oinamu miyuki puru opoarakwinwo no sinwo ni aranaku ni
apumi no ya yabase no sinwo wo ya pagazute makoto arieme ya kwopwisiki monowo
tukwikusa ni koromo pa suramu asatuyu ni nurete noti ni pa uturopinu tomo
wa ga kokoro yutani tayutani ukinunapa pye ni mo oki ni mo yorikatu masizi
iswonokami puru no wasada wo pidezu tomo sime dani papeyo moritutu woramu
sirasuge no manwo no paripara kokoro yu mo omopanu ware si koromo ni suritu
makwibasira tukuru swomabito isasameni karipo no tameto tukurikyeme ya mo
mukatuwo ni tateru momo no kwi naramu ka to pito so sasayaku na ga kokoro yume
taratineno papa ga sono n aru kupa surani negapeba kinu ni kisu to pu monowo
pasikiyasi wagipye no kemomo moto sigeku pana nomwi sakite narazu arame ya mo
mukatuwo no wakakatura no kwi siduye tori pana matu ima ni nagekituru kamo
iki no wo ni omopyeru ware wo yamadisa no pana ni ka kimi ga uturopinu ramu
suminoye no asasapawonwo no kakitupata kinu ni surituke kimu pi sirazu mo
aki saraba utusi mo semu to wa ga makisi karaawi no pana wo tare ka tumikyemu
kasuganwo ni sakitaru pagwi pa katayeda pa imada pupumyeri koto na taye sone
mimaku pori kwopwitutu matisi akipagwi pa pana nomwi sakite narazu kamo aramu
wagimokwo ga yadwo no akipagwi pana ywori pa mwi ni narite koso kwopwimasarikyere
asukagapa nanase no yodo ni sumu tori mo kokoroare koso nami tatezarame
mikuniyama konure ni sumapu musasabi no tori matu gotoku ware matiyasemu
ipakura no wonwo yu akidu ni tatiwataru kumo ni si mo are ya toki wo si matamu
amakumo ni tikaku pikarite naru kamwi no mireba kasikwosi mineba kanasi mo
panapada mo puranu ame yuwe nipatatumi itaku na yuki so pito no siru beku
pisakatano ame ni pa kinu wo ayasiku mo wa ga koromode pa puru toki naki ka
miswora yuku tukuyomiwotokwo yupusarazu me ni pa miredomo yoru yosi mo nasi
kasugayama yama takaka rasi ipa no pe no suga no ne mimu ni tukwi matigataki
yamwi no ywo pa kurusiki monowo itu si ka to wa ga matu tukwi mo paya mo teranu ka
asasimo no keyasuki inoti ta ga tameni titose moga mo to wa ga omopanaku ni
yamato no uda no mapani no sani tukaba soko mo ka pito no wa wo kotonasamu
yupu kakete maturu mimoro no kamusabwite ituku ni pa arazu pitome opomi koso
yupu kakete ituku ko no mori kwoyenu beku omopoyuru kamo kwopwi no sigeki ni
tayezu yuku asukanokapa no yodomyeraba yuwe si mo aru goto pito no mimaku ni
asukagapa seze ni tamamo pa opwitaredo sigarami areba nabikiapanaku ni
pirosegapa swode tuku bakari asaki wo ya kokoro pukamete wa ga mopyeru ramu
patusegapa nagaru minawa no tayeba koso wa ga omopu kokoro togezi to omopame
nageki seba pito sirinu bemi yamagapa no tagitu kokoro wo sekiapete aru kamo
migomorini ikidukiamari payakapa no se ni pa tatu tomo pito ni ipame ya mo
makanamoti yuge no kapara no umoregwi no araparu masiziki koto ni aranaku ni
opobune ni makadi sizinuki kogidenaba oki pa pukakyemu sipo pa pwinu tomo
pusikwoye yu yukamasi monowo mamorapu ni utinurasayenu nami yomazusite
ipasosoku kwisi no uramwi ni yosuru nami pye ni kiyoraba ka koto no sigekyemu
iswo no ura ni kiyoru siranami kapyeritutu sugwikatenaku pa tare ni tayutape
apuminoumi nami kasikwomito kaze mamori tosi pa ya penamu kogu to pa nasi ni
asanagi ni kiyoru siranami mimaku pori ware pa suredomo kaze koso yosene
murasakino natakanoura no managwotuti swode nomwi purite nezu ka narinamu
toyokuni no kiku no pamapye no managwotuti manaponi si araba nani ka nagekamu
sipo miteba irinuru iswo no kusa nare ya miraku sukunaku kwopuraku no opoki
oki tu nami yosuru ariswo no nanoriso pa kokoro no uti ni yamapi to nareri
murasakino natakanoura no nanoriso ga iswo ni nabikamu toki matu ware wo
ariswo kwosu nami pa kasikwosi sikasugani umi no tamamo no nikuku pa arazusite
sasanami no sigatu no ura no puna nori ni norinisi kokoro tune wasurayezu
momodutapu yaswo no simamwi wo kogu pune ni norinisi kokoro wasurekanetu mo
simadutapu abayano wobune kaze mamori tosi pa ya penamu apu to pa nasi ni
minagwirapu oki tu kwosima ni kaze wo payami pune yosekanetu kokoro pa omopedo
koto sakeba oki yu sakenamu minatwo ywori pye tukapu toki ni saku beki monoka
minusa tori miwa no papuri ga ipapu sugwipara takigwikori potopotosikuni tewono torayenu
kagami nasu wa ga misi kimi wo aba no nwo no panatatibana no tama ni piripitu
akidunwo wo pito no kakureba asa makisi kimi ga omopoyete nageki pa yamazu
akidunwo ni asa wiru kumo no useyukeba kinopu mo kyepu mo naki pito omopoyu
komorikuno patusenoyama ni kasumi tati tanabiku kumo pa imo ni ka mo aramu
tapakoto ka oyodurekoto ka komorikuno patusenoyama ni ipori seri to ipu
akiyama no momiti aparebi uraburete irinisi imo pa matedo kimasazu
yononaka pa makoto putayo pa yukaza rasi sugwinisi imo ni apanaku omopeba
sakipapi no ikanaru pito ka kurwokami no sirwoku naru made imo ga kowe wo kiku
wa ga sekwo wo iduku yukame to sakitake no sogapi ni nesiku ima si kuyasi mo
nipatutori kakye no tariwo no midarewo no nagaki kokoro mo omopoyenu kamo
komomakura apimakisi kwo mo araba koso ywo no pukuraku mo wa ga wosimi seme
tamadusano imo pa tama kamo asipikwino kiywoki yamapye ni makeba tirinuru
tamadusano imo pa pana kamo asipikwino ko no yamakage ni makeba usenuru
nagwonoumi wo asa kogikureba watanaka ni kakwo so naku naru apare so no kakwo
